zh.Hingham, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Briti: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼辛加姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Lobdell於大約1578年出生在英國素可海斯廷斯時，他的父親Nicholas Lobdell26歲，母親Bridget Pierce22歲。他於大約1602年與Martha Ward在英國英格蘭素可海斯廷斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1648年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼辛加姆享年71歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼辛加姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Lobdell于大约1578年出生在英国素可海斯廷斯时，他的父亲Nicholas Lobdell26岁，母亲Bridget Pierce22岁。他于大约1602年与Martha Ward在英国英格兰素可海斯廷斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1648年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼辛加姆享年71岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼辛加姆。

nameMeanings.name: Lobdell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When William Lobdell was born about 1578, in Hastings, Sussex, England, his father, Nicholas Lobdell, was 26 and his mother, Bridget Pierce, was 22. He married Martha Ward about 1602, in Hastings, Sussex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1648, in Hingham, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 71, and was buried in Hingham, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Lobdell est né environ 1578, à Hastings, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Nicholas Lobdell, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Bridget Pierce, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Martha Ward environ 1602, à Hastings, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1648, à Hingham, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à Hingham, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

ja.lifeSummary: William Lobdellが約1578年にイギリススセックスハスティングズで生まれた時，父Nicholas Lobdellは26歳，母Bridget Pierceは22歳であった。約1602年にイギリスイギリススセックスハスティングズでMartha Wardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1648年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーヒンガムで71歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーヒンガムにて埋葬された。

ko.Hingham, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Briti: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 잉함
ko.lifeSummary: William Lobdell(이)가 대략 1578년 영국 수세스 하스틴그스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas Lobdell(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Bridget Pierce(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1602년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 하스틴그스에서 Martha Ward(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1648년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 잉함에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 잉함에 묻혔다.

ru.Hingham, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Briti: хингхам, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Lobdell родился около 1578 г. в местности хастингс, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Nicholas Lobdell было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Bridget Pierce, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Martha Ward около 1602 г. в местности хастингс, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1648 г. в местности хингхам, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности хингхам, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.
